tasks.prompt: github.com ning A (IPv4) yozuvini 'a.txt' ga yoz (dig +short ... A yoki getent).
https://example.com HTTP status kodini (3 raqam) 'code.txt' ga yoz (curl -w '%{http_code}').
github.com TLS sertifikat muddatini 'cert.txt' ga yoz (openssl ... x509 -noout -dates).
github.com:443 port ochiqligini tekshir; ochiq bo'lsa 'port.txt' ga 'open' yoz (nc -z).
curl -sI bilan github.com header'larini 'h.txt' ga yoz (HTTP javob qatori bo'lsin).
